product.name: Modern LED Bathroom Vanity Light 24 inch 18W Dimmable 3CCT Bathroom Light Fixture Over Mirror Rectangle Bath Vanity Light Bar with Double Layer Acrylic Shade (Chrome)
features: 3 Color Temperatures & Dimmable : This bathroom vanity light switches from warm white - 3000K, natural white - 4000K, and cool white - 6000K light via toggle switch. It's also dimmable from 10% to 100% for the perfect ambiance.
Brighter & Color Accuracy : With powerful 18W LEDs and 85+ CRI, this bathroom light fixture over mirror ensures colors look true-to-life, ideal for precise grooming and makeup.

Rust-Resistant : Built to last in moist environments. The high-quality base and dual-layer acrylic shade make this bath vanity light bar resistant to rust and humidity, ensuring long-term reliability. It is widely applied to most indoor scenes, for bathroom light fixtures, vanity light over mirror, wall lamp and bedroom wall light.

50,000-Hour Lifespan : A long-term investment in your space. Featuring a sleek design and energy-efficient LEDs that provide up to 50,000 hours of light, this fixture combines style with enduring performance.
Easy to install : All the needed hardware and the installation instruction are included in the package; connect the reserved wires and wall-mount on the US junction box.
